title: WORKFLOW — Quy trình phối hợp 2 người
scope: Defines the two-person collaboration workflow (Track A / Track B) for the VinFast Callbot project, covering file ownership rules, Wave 0 sequential setup, Wave 1-2 parallel development, shared-file policies, branch/PR cadence, conflict resolution, and secret safety.
key_decisions: Each file has exactly one owner; touching another person's file requires notifying them first.
Wave 0 tasks (TASK-001 scaffold, TASK-002 schemas, TASK-003 interfaces) must run sequentially, not in parallel, because they all touch shared files.
models/schemas.py and all */base.py are frozen after TASK-003; signature changes require both tracks to agree and immediately pull.
pipeline.py is owned by Track B and reviewed by Track A; B must not write it until TASK-A13 (engine) has merged to main.
requirements.txt is append-only and alphabetically ordered; conflicts are resolved by union (keep both lines).
Branch protection on main enforced; no direct pushes, all changes via PR with cross-review.
PRs must not stay open more than one day; both tracks must end each day on a green main.
.env and *.onnx and scenarios/audio/*.wav must never be committed (enforced via .gitignore from TASK-001).
